message:
fix(core): repair 3 pre-existing test failures in frankenterm-core

- learn: test expected "What is wa?" but code says "What is ft?" after
  rename; updated assertion to match
- runtime: storage lock hold test used 60ms but threshold is 75ms;
  bumped test value to 80ms
- scrollback_eviction: byte budget (60) only required evicting 1 of 2
  low-value lines but assertion expected both gone; tightened budget
  to 40 to force eviction of both low-importance lines

All 5474 frankenterm-core tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
